verdict_reason: Solid @WebMvcTest slice covering all AC status codes, but two Major assertion gaps: the forwarded payload content is never asserted (publish verified with any()) and the 4xx rejection tests never verify nothing was sent to ASB, leaving that AC clause untested.

todos.issue: post_returnsAccepted_forValidJson verifies publish(any(JsonNode.class)) but never asserts the forwarded content equals the posted body — AC requires the endpoint to send 'that content' to ASB, and a controller forwarding a wrong/empty node would still pass
todos.fix: Capture the argument (ArgumentCaptor<JsonNode> or eq(objectMapper.readTree(...))) and assert the published JsonNode equals the posted JSON

todos.issue: Rejection tests (missing body, malformed JSON, unsupported media type) assert only the 4xx status — none verify queueMessageSender was never invoked, leaving the AC clause 'is rejected with a 4xx response and is not sent to ASB' untested
todos.fix: Add verifyNoInteractions(queueMessageSender) (or verify(queueMessageSender, never()).publish(any())) to each rejection test

todos.issue: Tests omit the // Given / // When / // Then comment blocks that the unit-testing guide mandates for all tests (short tests may combine as // When & Then)
todos.fix: Add // Given / // When & Then comment blocks to each test method
